article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.14. CC - Supply and Install of Sewer Cover Water Level Sensors 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $123,475 contract change for sewer water level sensors
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on approving a $123,475 contract change with ADS Environmental Technologies Inc. to supply replacement battery packs, antennas, and 12-month monitoring subscriptions for 45 sewer sensors across the city.
